audit_items.proof_trace: The post-loop gate at L271-273 unconditionally sets `eligibleAssetsIdx = 0` whenever `isAssetOutPriceValid` is false, covering every code path. `isAssetOutPriceValid` is set during the loop when `asset == s_assetOut` (L240-242), and `s_assetOut` is guaranteed to be in `s_allowlistedAssets` because `whenAssetOutConfigured` requires non-zero decimals in `s_assetParams[s_assetOut]`, which can only be set via `_applyAssetParamsUpdates` (L632) that enforces `s_allowlistedAssets.contains(asset)`. `_getAssetPrice` correctly flags both zero-price and stale-price cases as invalid (PriceManager.sol L404-406).
